name: Square Embroidered Vine Pillow Neutral/Green - Threshold™
description:
Add botanical beauty to your seating or bedding ensemble with this Square Embroidered Vine Pillow from Threshold™. This 18-inch square throw pillow showcases a neutral beige surface adorned with embroidered vines in green shades, complemented by corded trim accents. Crafted with a cotton-lyocell-linen blend fabric exterior and filled with 100% recycled polyester, it adds cushioned comfort to any sofa, bed, bench or chair.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
